allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\Comprehensive Computer Design1" -Recurse -Depth 2 -Force | Select-Object FullName, Mode | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Mode\) $\($_.FullName\)" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); & "D:\\nodejs\\node.exe" --version 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Get-ChildItem "D:\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node /T 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName })

PowerShell($base = "d:\\Comprehensive Computer Design1\\board-game-platform"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$base\\server\\src\\config", "$base\\server\\src\\models", "$base\\server\\src\\routes", "$base\\server\\src\\middleware", "$base\\server\\src\\services", "$base\\server\\src\\game-engine", "$base\\server\\src\\socket", "$base\\client\\src\\components\\common", "$base\\client\\src\\components\\auth", "$base\\client\\src\\components\\lobby", "$base\\client\\src\\components\\game", "$base\\client\\src\\components\\profile", "$base\\client\\src\\pages", "$base\\client\\src\\stores", "$base\\client\\src\\hooks", "$base\\client\\src\\services", "$base\\client\\src\\utils", "$base\\docs" | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Created: $_" })

PowerShell($env:Path = "D:\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Set-Location "d:\\Comprehensive Computer Design1\\board-game-platform"; npx create-vite@latest client --template react-ts 2>&1)
